label: Counter emulator — random test data
info:
Generates plausible-looking live data for velbus-emulate-counter's 4 reference channels (Test/kWh, Water/liter, Nitrogen/m3, CO2/liter) every 3 seconds, so real OLED panel behaviour can be watched updating live without a real utility meter.

Before using:
1. Edit the 'Velbus Gateway' config node with your gateway's host/port.
2. Open the Counter node and confirm its address (0x50) is free on your bus, and its 4 channels match your own OLED Counter page assignments.
3. Deploy — the inject node fires every 3 seconds automatically.

Cumulative values genuinely accumulate over time (persisted in flow context, resets on redeploy). Current rate is randomised within a plausible range each cycle, not derived from the cumulative change, so it won't reconcile against real physics — it's there to give moving numbers on a real OLED, not a physically accurate simulation.

name: Generate test readings
